case_title: LI FENG YAN VS. KING DOM WU ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE: FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAN, LI FENG AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, CAROLE
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE: FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAN, LI FENG AS TO DEFENDANT WU, GUO QUAN

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CAROLE CHAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-23-2016 AT 3:30 PM. AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF LI FENG YAN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: PRO TEM DANIEL WEINGARTEN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAN, LI FENG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF CORRECTION OF NAME CORRECT SPELLING OF NAME IS GUO QUAN WU FILED BY DEFENDANT WU, GUO QUAN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY YAN, LI FENG
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY YAN, LI FENG AS TO DEFENDANT WU, GUO QUAN CHAN, CAROLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-23-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER DOROTHY WONG. DEFENDANT GUO QUAN WU WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAROLE CHAN WAS NOT PRESENT. MEDIATED DISPOSITION. IF NO APPEARANCES DECEMBER 23, 2016, AT 3:30 PM, CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAN, LI FENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, GUO QUAN $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YAN, LI FENG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-23-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DANIEL WEINGARTEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LI FENG YAN. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER DOROTHY WONG ASSISTED MS. YAN AT TODAY'S HEARING. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS GUO QUAN WU OR CAROLE CHAN. PLAINTIFF SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT GUO QUAN WU PARTICIPATED IN A MEDIATION SESSION ON NOVEMBER 1, 2016, WHEREIN DEFENDANT GUO QUAN WU AGREED TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS TO PLAINTIFF UNTIL THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE WAS PAID IN FULL. TO DATE, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RECEIVED ANY PAYMENTS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE CASE FILE AS TO DEFENDANT CAROLE CHAN. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, HER CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT CAROLE CHAN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DANIEL WEINGARTEN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
